title: doctrine sync: orchestrator-claims-before-spawn in skill text + final render/manifest (D1+D3 close)

Final release_manifest --write + --check. Re-render skill projections only if test_skill_render demands. This cell is docs/skill-text/config only — no lib edits.

no literal handed-down session id remains in worker templates

verify: node scripts/test_skill_render.mjs && node scripts/test_conformance.mjs && node scripts/census_stale_spawn_syntax.mjs && node scripts/release_manifest.mjs --check
